Hardware Component File

Combined_DCDC_OBC_AC3_V2.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference OneBox_DCDC_OBC_AC3_V2_20220909T124037.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 18DADDF1
Receive ID 18DAF1DD
Functional Addr DD
Functional Name Superviseur-DCDC_29b

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "17",
    "supplier": "EVTECH",
    "soft": "B200",
    "version": "OBCDCDC3.00"
  }
]

Associated Devices

DCDC_HV Voltage/Current ID:
DCDC_LV Voltage/Current ID:
OneBox_Component Failures ID:
OneBox_Component Temperature ID:
OBC_HVAC Voltage ID:
OBC_AC Frequency fail ID:
OBC_HV Current ID:
Internal CAN issues ID:
HEVC CAN frames issues ID:
Bus OFF ID:
BMS CAN frames issues ID:
USM CAN frames issues ID:
HECM CAN frames issues ID:
